user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Account flagged as dark (no interaction in 60+ days) or user initiated for Quantum Analytics.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

required_artifacts: Multi-touch re-engagement sequence with channel selection

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF13-D trap (Ignores why customer went dark); produces complete Multi-touch re-engagement sequence with channel selection, timing, personalized messaging per touch,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF13-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF13-D failure mode (Ignores why customer went dark)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF13-D -- Ignores why customer went dark
